name: Middle-aged urolithin A muscle-strength registry is recruiting with no posted results
summary: NCT07231783 is a direct urolithin A replication/watchlist trial for muscle strength, but it has no posted results.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT07231783 as a recruiting 120-participant randomized Mitopure trial in adults aged 40 to 65 years, with knee-flexion strength as the primary endpoint and no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
time_horizon: 4- and 6-month endpoints with estimated completion on 2027-10-31
quantitative_note: Estimated enrollment is 120; registry status is recruiting; result status is not posted.
caveats: No-results registry status is not evidence of efficacy.
The registry is relevant for future replication of muscle-strength signals but does not currently change stage or confidence.
Results would need prespecified functional benefit and interpretable safety to strengthen the mitophagy read.
